summary: Phase 3 QA Fixes Round 2 - All 13 test items PASSED. Verified GST Invoice math in Product Tour Step 3, Step 6 title rename, skill gap crisis pain card, 30+ EV model standardization, social proof stats, Docs page rewrites, and 'Private Limited' replacement across all pages.
